tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Take Your Fingers From My Hair

content:
[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  (2x)

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
When dreaming I'm guided to another world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Time and time again[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
At sunrise I fight to stay asleep[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Because I don't want to leave the comfort of this place[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Because there's a hunger, a longing to escape[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
From the life I live when I'm awake[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
So let's go there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Let's make our escape[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
Come on, let's go there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Let's ask, "Can we stay?"[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
 Can you take me higher?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 To a place where blind men see[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
 Can you take me higher?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 To a place with golden streets[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
Although I would like our world to change[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
It helps me to appreciate[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Those nights and those dreams[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
But, my friend, I'd sacrifice all those nights[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
If I could make the earth and my dreams the same[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
The only difference is[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
To let love replace all our hate[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]      
So let's go there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Let's make our escape[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
Come on, let's go there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]

[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
